typecheck.command: n/a - project uses JavaScript without TypeScript

nonBlockingIssues.description: setPolicyType silently returns without setting a default when invalid policy is passed. It logs a warning but doesn't fall back to a valid policy type, potentially leaving the UI in an inconsistent state.

suggestions.description: addManualItem validates item.id exists but doesn't check for duplicate IDs or validate the ID format. Could lead to multiple items with same ID in manualItems array.
activeTab is not persisted to localStorage. While not explicitly required by the feature description, persisting the last active tab would improve UX.
The detectedItems Map is initialized with a new Map() but this creates a new Map instance on every module reload. Consider documenting this is intentional for HMR compatibility.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Vite + React + Tailwind CSS v4 configuration pattern with proper plugin setup (@tailwindcss/vite), path aliasing (@/ → src/), and vitest configuration with jsdom environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Used in project-scaffolding feature. vite.config.js contains proper plugin setup [react(), tailwindcss()], resolve alias {'@': path.resolve(__dirname, './src')}, and test configuration.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Tailwind CSS v4 import syntax (@import 'tailwindcss') and common CSS loading issues that may require debugging.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker discovered during app-state-context implementation that Tailwind v4 has specific import requirements that differ from v3.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add localStorage mocking pattern for Vitest + jsdom testing convention: use Object.defineProperty with getItem/setItem/clear/removeItem vi.fn() mocks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: app-state-context tests implement comprehensive localStorage mocking that could be reused by other features with persistence requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that workers should use Create tool when experiencing file editing friction (multiple Read attempts), as this pattern successfully resolved editing issues.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: project-scaffolding worker experienced friction with file editing - 6+ Read calls before successfully creating files with Create tool.

rejectedObservations.observation: File editing friction experienced by workers
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented - AGENTS.md already has guidance about using Create tool for new files
rejectedObservations.evidence: Workers successfully resolved issues using Create tool, which is already recommended in conventions.

featureReviews.summary: Successfully initializes React + Vite project with all required dependencies and configurations. Vite dev server starts on port 5173, Tailwind CSS compiles correctly, Vitest runs and passes 4 tests, path alias @/ resolves to src/, git repo initialized. No issues found.

Complete coverage rules data and lookup utilities. 27 COCO categories with rules for all 4 policy types (renters, homeowners, auto, none). Coverage entries have status, color, estimatedValue, note, conditions, upgrade. Pure lookup function implemented. Value calculator functions for total, protected, unprotected, coverageGap%. 118 comprehensive unit tests passing. No blocking or non-blocking issues found. Feature is production-ready.

Full implementation of React context and provider for app-wide state management. Provides all required state (policyType, onboardingComplete, activeTab, detectedItems Map, manualItems array, selectedItemId) and actions. localStorage persistence works correctly for policyType, onboardingComplete, and manualItems. useAppContext hook properly throws when used outside a provider. 25 comprehensive tests covering all functionality including edge cases. All 143 tests passing. Minor non-blocking issues around setPolicyType fallback behavior.

issues.description: setPolicyType silently returns without setting a default when invalid policy is passed
